customer_profile: SME FX broker, declared monthly volume ~GBP 80k
summary: 9 outbound transfers of GBP 9,200-9,700 to 3 newly added counterparties, followed by a single inbound of GBP 84,000 from a fourth party.

customer_profile: Retail account, salaried, avg balance GBP 3k
